title: Learn AWS IAM in less than 10 minutes
summary: A video tutorial from AWS Developers explaining AWS Identity and Access Management fundamentals for beginners. The content covers IAM concepts including users, roles, policies, least privilege principles, and practical security practices like avoiding hardcoded access keys and using IAM Access Analyzer.
